ddls:
CREATE TABLE "census_data" (
  "sa2_maincode_2016" INTEGER /* Main code for the Statistical Area 2 (SA2) region */,
  "tot_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the SA2 region */,
  "tot_lp_h" INTEGER /* Total population living in low-density housing (LP_H) */,
  "tot_gh" INTEGER /* Total population living in group housing (GH) */,
  "tot_oh" INTEGER /* Total population living in other housing (OH) */,
  "tot_t" INTEGER /* Total population of the SA2 region (T) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the data belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of data */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sa2_maincode_2016", "dataset_id", "version"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sa2_regions" (
  "sa2_maincode_2016" INTEGER /* Main code for the SA2 region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the SA2 region */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the SA2 region is located */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the SA2 region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sa2_maincode_2016")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the metadata belongs to */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was released */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Start date of the dataset's validity */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* End date of the dataset's validity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the dataset was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser used to access the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
